en: The LORD spoke to Moses, saying,
zh: 耶和華對摩西說：

en: "Command the people of Israel and say to them, 'My offering, my food for my food offerings, my pleasing aroma, you shall be careful to offer to me at its appointed time.'
zh: “你要吩咐以色列人說：‘你們應獻給我的供物，就是獻給我作馨香的火祭的食物，要小心按著日期獻給我。’

en: And you shall say to them, This is the food offering that you shall offer to the LORD: two male lambs a year old without blemish, day by day, as a regular offering.
zh: 你又要對他們說：‘你們要獻給耶和華的火祭是這樣：沒有殘疾、一歲的公羊羔，每天兩隻，作為常獻的燔祭。

en: The one lamb you shall offer in the morning, and the other lamb you shall offer at twilight;
zh: 早晨要獻一隻，黃昏獻一隻；

en: also a tenth of an ephah of fine flour for a grain offering, mixed with a quarter of a hin of beaten oil.
zh: 也要獻一公斤細麵，用搗成的油一公升調和，作為素祭。

en: It is a regular burnt offering, which was ordained at Mount Sinai for a pleasing aroma, a food offering to the LORD.
zh: 這就是常獻的燔祭，是在西奈山規定，作為獻給耶和華馨香的火祭。

en: Its drink offering shall be a quarter of a hin for each lamb. In the Holy Place you shall pour out a drink offering of strong drink to the LORD.
zh: 為每隻公羊羔，要同獻一公升作奠祭的酒；你要在聖所中把醇酒獻給耶和華作奠祭。

en: The other lamb you shall offer at twilight. Like the grain offering of the morning, and like its drink offering, you shall offer it as a food offering, with a pleasing aroma to the LORD.
zh: 晚上你要獻上另一隻公羊羔，要照著早晨的素祭，和同獻的奠祭獻上，作馨香的火祭獻給耶和華。

en: "On the Sabbath day, two male lambs a year old without blemish, and two tenths of an ephah of fine flour for a grain offering, mixed with oil, and its drink offering:
zh: “‘在安息日，要獻兩隻沒有殘疾、一歲的公羊羔，也要獻兩公斤細麵，用油調和作素祭；還有同獻的奠祭。

en: this is the burnt offering of every Sabbath, besides the regular burnt offering and its drink offering.
zh: 這是安息日獻的燔祭；在那常獻的燔祭和同獻的奠祭以外。

en: "At the beginnings of your months, you shall offer a burnt offering to the LORD: two bulls from the herd, one ram, seven male lambs a year old without blemish;
zh: “‘每月第一日，你們要把燔祭獻給耶和華，就是兩頭公牛犢、一隻公綿羊、七隻沒有殘疾一歲的公羊羔。

en: also three tenths of an ephah of fine flour for a grain offering, mixed with oil, for each bull, and two tenths of fine flour for a grain offering, mixed with oil, for the one ram;
zh: 為每頭公牛，要獻三公斤細麵，用油調和作素祭；為每隻公綿羊，要獻兩公斤細麵，用油調和作素祭；

en: and a tenth of fine flour mixed with oil as a grain offering for every lamb; for a burnt offering with a pleasing aroma, a food offering to the LORD.
zh: 為每隻公羊羔，要獻一公斤細麵，用油調和作素祭；這是馨香的燔祭，是獻給耶和華的火祭。

en: Their drink offerings shall be half a hin of wine for a bull, a third of a hin for a ram, and a quarter of a hin for a lamb. This is the burnt offering of each month throughout the months of the year.
zh: 每頭公牛要獻酒兩公升作奠祭，每隻公綿羊獻酒一公升半，每隻公羊羔獻酒一公升。這是每月當獻的燔祭，一年之中每個月都要這樣。

en: Also one male goat for a sin offering to the LORD; it shall be offered besides the regular burnt offering and its drink offering.
zh: 又要把一隻公山羊作贖罪祭獻給耶和華，在那常獻的燔祭和同獻的奠祭以外。

en: "On the fourteenth day of the first month is the LORD's Passover,
zh: “‘正月十四日，是耶和華的逾越節。

en: and on the fifteenth day of this month is a feast. Seven days shall unleavened bread be eaten.
zh: 這月十五日是節期；要吃無酵餅七日。

en: On the first day there shall be a holy convocation. You shall not do any ordinary work,
zh: 第一日要有聖會，甚麼勞碌的工都不可作，

en: but offer a food offering, a burnt offering to the LORD: two bulls from the herd, one ram, and seven male lambs a year old; see that they are without blemish;
zh: 只要獻火祭給耶和華作燔祭，就是兩頭公牛犢、一隻公綿羊和七隻一歲的公羊羔，都要完全沒有殘疾的。

en: also their grain offering of fine flour mixed with oil; three tenths of an ephah shall you offer for a bull, and two tenths for a ram;
zh: 同獻的素祭，是用油調和的細麵，為每頭公牛犢要獻三公斤；為每隻公綿羊要獻兩公斤；

en: a tenth shall you offer for each of the seven lambs;
zh: 為那七隻公羊羔，每隻要獻一公斤；

en: also one male goat for a sin offering, to make atonement for you.
zh: 還要獻一隻公山羊作贖罪祭，為你們贖罪。

en: You shall offer these besides the burnt offering of the morning, which is for a regular burnt offering.
zh: 除了早晨的燔祭，就是常獻的燔祭以外，還要把這些祭物獻上。

en: In the same way you shall offer daily, for seven days, the food of a food offering, with a pleasing aroma to the LORD. It shall be offered besides the regular burnt offering and its drink offering.
zh: 一連七日，每日都要獻上這樣的祭物，給耶和華作馨香火祭的食物，是在常獻的燔祭和同獻的奠祭以外的。

en: And on the seventh day you shall have a holy convocation. You shall not do any ordinary work.
zh: 第七日你們要有聖會，甚麼勞碌的工都不可作。

en: "On the day of the firstfruits, when you offer a grain offering of new grain to the LORD at your Feast of Weeks, you shall have a holy convocation. You shall not do any ordinary work,
zh: “‘在初熟日，即七七節那一天，你們把新素祭獻給耶和華的時候，要有聖會，甚麼勞碌的工都不可作，

en: but offer a burnt offering, with a pleasing aroma to the LORD: two bulls from the herd, one ram, seven male lambs a year old;
zh: 只要把燔祭作為馨香的祭獻給耶和華，就是兩頭公牛犢、一隻公綿羊、七隻一歲的公羊羔。

en: also their grain offering of fine flour mixed with oil, three tenths of an ephah for each bull, two tenths for one ram,
zh: 同獻的素祭，是用油調和的細麵，為每頭公牛要獻三公斤；為每隻公綿羊，要獻兩公斤；

en: a tenth for each of the seven lambs;
zh: 為那七隻公羊羔，每隻要獻一公斤；

en: with one male goat, to make atonement for you.
zh: 還要獻一隻公山羊，為你們贖罪；

en: Besides the regular burnt offering and its grain offering, you shall offer them and their drink offering. See that they are without blemish.
zh: 除了常獻的燔祭和同獻的素祭以外，你們還要獻上這些祭物和同獻的奠祭，都要沒有殘疾的。’”
